name: x-purge
description: Automated post deletion for X (Twitter). Easily reclaim your privacy by clearing your timeline in bulk.

scripts.generate-icons: mkdir -p src/icons && sips -Z 16 assets/logo.png --out src/icons/icon16.png && sips -Z 32 assets/logo.png --out src/icons/icon32.png && sips -Z 48 assets/logo.png --out src/icons/icon48.png && sips -Z 128 assets/logo.png --out src/icons/icon128.png
scripts.minify: esbuild dist/*.js dist/*.css --minify --allow-overwrite --outdir=dist && html-minifier-terser --collapse-whitespace --remove-comments dist/popup.html -o dist/popup.html
scripts.build: npm run dev && npm run minify
scripts.dev: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && cp -r src/* dist/
